anti_claim: The exported mission transaction bundle validates public work, claim, dependency, checkpoint-lane, receipt-drain, and closeout metadata. It does import exact non-secret Task Ledger, Work Ledger, checkpoint-lane, scoped-commit, and mission-transaction control-plane source bodies into the public bundle. It does not mutate live Task Ledger, Work Ledger, or Git state, authorize broad staging or private backup execution without operator intent, authorize release, or complete later organs.

omitted_secret_or_live_access_material: Git index contents outside declared owned paths

fixture_payload_policy: negative_regression_fixtures_only; positive runtime evidence consumes public work_landing substrate

public_mission_transaction_preflight.anti_claim: Public mission transaction preflight classifies declared Work Ledger, Git-parent, and checkpoint-lane metadata. It does not inspect the live Git index, mutate ledgers, release claims, authorize broad staging, or prove that work landed.

public_path_sanitization.body_text_boundary: Receipt path normalization records hashed originals, replacements, field paths, and treatment classes only; private host path strings are not public receipt evidence.

public_work_landing_status.anti_claim: This public work-landing tool is a source-faithful public refactor of the macro command and controller-action shape. It emits deterministic local receipts only; it does not mutate Task Ledger, Work Ledger, Git, or private macro state.

secret_exclusion_scan.anti_claim: Scanner terms are regression sentinels for tests and declared import rows. A pass is not a complete secret scan, credential audit, release clearance, or proof that no private material exists.
secret_exclusion_scan.exclusion_policy: Open-source macro substrate by default; exclude only secrets, credentials, operator conversation bodies, provider payloads, account/session state, and credential-equivalent live-access material.

scan_scope.intended_use: Detect declared synthetic sentinel tokens and classify explicit macro-import material rows before public body import.

secret_exclusion_scan.synthetic_receipt_policy: Synthetic receipts are admissible only as regression or negative-case harness artifacts, or as named blocked-import debt. They are not substitutes for non-secret macro substrate, real runtime receipts, real copied bodies, or source-faithful refactors.

work_landing_reconcile_plan.anti_claim: This public work-landing tool is a source-faithful public refactor of the macro command and controller-action shape. It emits deterministic local receipts only; it does not mutate Task Ledger, Work Ledger, Git, or private macro state.
